name: Very Very Soon - Nie Meer Baie Lank
chorusText:
Very, very soon
We are going to see our King	 x3
And praise Him Lord of all
And praise Him Lord of all 	x3
And praise Him Lord of all
Nie meer baie lank
Dan gaan ons Jesus sien 	x3
En loof Hom as die Heer
loof Hom as die Heer 	x3
En loof Hom as die Heer
